As part of our Incident Response Framework (IRF-2021), it is imperative for all targeted personnel, including Alice, to verify their credentials through the secure link provided immediately to prevent any unauthorized access to sensitive information.

Thank you for your urgent attention and action on this matter.

Best, 
Cybersecurity Incident Response Team

By anchoring it in a 'latest incident' context, it should naturally enforce compliance without conflicting actions.
